identity.name: MONO AUREL
identity.aesthetic: Dark Luxury, Gallery, Brutalist Elegance, Organic Textures
identity.description: El yapımı seramik heykeller, totem objeler ve dekoratif taş eserler sunan karanlık lüks bir sanat atölyesi.

animation.gsap: GSAP (GreenSock) for complex timelines and scroll triggers
animation.framer_motion: Framer Motion for component transitions and gestures

tech_stack.icons: Lucide React (default), use Phosphor Icons for thinner, more elegant lines if needed

usage.h1: font-serif text-5xl md:text-7xl lg:text-9xl italic font-light tracking-tighter leading-[0.9]
usage.h2: font-serif text-4xl md:text-6xl italic font-light tracking-tight mb-8
usage.h3: font-sans text-xl md:text-2xl font-normal uppercase tracking-widest text-accent/80
usage.nav: font-sans text-sm font-medium uppercase tracking-widest hover:text-accent transition-colors
usage.quote: font-serif text-3xl md:text-5xl italic text-muted-foreground/60 leading-tight

visual_enhancers.grain: Use a fixed full-screen div with a noise svg/png overlay at 3-5% opacity using 'mix-blend-overlay' to create a film grain effect.
visual_enhancers.cursor: Custom magnetic cursor using GSAP/Framer Motion. Small dot that expands into a ring on hover.
visual_enhancers.parallax: Parallax scrolling on all large images using GSAP ScrollTrigger or Framer Motion useScroll.
visual_enhancers.marquee: Slow moving text ribbons for 'MONO AUREL' branding sections.

layout_strategies.grid_gallery: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-4 md:gap-8 auto-rows-[400px]
layout_strategies.bento_grid: Use asymmetrical grid layouts (Mode A from rules). Never use equal squares for everything.

buttons.primary: rounded-full border border-[#c9b99a] text-[#c9b99a] bg-transparent hover:bg-[#c9b99a] hover:text-black transition-all duration-500 ease-out px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm
buttons.secondary: text-[#f0ece4] underline decoration-1 underline-offset-8 hover:text-[#c9b99a] transition-colors uppercase tracking-widest text-xs

cards.product: group relative overflow-hidden bg-transparent border-none. Image scales on hover. Info appears/slides up on hover.
cards.feature: bg-[#111111] p-8 border border-white/5 hover:border-[#c9b99a]/30 transition-colors duration-500

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 px-0 py-4 focus:border-[#c9b99a] focus:ring-0 rounded-none placeholder:text-white/20 transition-all

instructions_to_main_agent: SETUP_TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to include the specific color palette and fonts.
SETUP_ANIMATIONS: Initialize Lenis in App.js for smooth scrolling. Use GSAP for the Hero parallax.
GLOBAL_STYLES: Add the @fontsource imports in index.js or App.js. Apply 'bg-[#0a0a0a] text-[#f0ece4]' to body in index.css.
COMPONENT_RULE: Do not use default Shadcn cards for products. Build custom minimal image-heavy components.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure text contrast ratios (Gold on Black) are readable. Use lighter gold/beige for small text if needed.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid 'AI slop'.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute.
